title: Notice of opening of Gericke Road link with Garret Street
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Construction of the northern...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Construction of the northern extension of Gericke Road will be completed on 17 April 2025.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Construction of the northern extension of Gericke Road will be completed on 17 April 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This Link will improve accessibility to the northern areas of Voorbaai and Bayview via Garret Street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU.","html":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
